---
name: Feature request / 功能建议
about: Suggest an improvement / 提出改进建议
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / 问题

What user problem does this solve?

它解决什么用户问题？

## Proposed solution / 方案

Describe the desired behavior.

描述期望行为。

## Alternatives / 替代方案

Any simpler or safer options?

有没有更简单或更安全的方案？

## Acceptance checks / 验收检查

- [ ] User workflow is documented / 用户流程已写入文档
- [ ] Tests or audit scripts cover it / 测试或审计脚本已覆盖
- [ ] No secrets or runtime artifacts are added / 未加入密钥或运行产物
